product_overview: A web frontend for students to manage classes and tasks with cloud sync, backup/restore, scheduling, and productivity features (dark mode, multi-language, real-time clock). Built with React, Vite, TailwindCSS and Firebase for auth/sync.
core_goals: Provide a single dashboard to view and organize classes and tasks quickly
Allow adding, editing, reordering and deleting classes and tasks with straightforward forms
Support cross-device sync via Firebase Auth (Google) and JSON backup/restore
Offer productivity features: search & filters, attachment support, bulk operations, and visual indicators for deadlines
Enable accessibility and personalization: dark mode and multi-language (EN/ID)
Keep header time/date updated in real time

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to sign in with email/password or Google (Firebase) to enable cloud sync and access protected routes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill email input field -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See dashboard at /
Navigate to / -> Click Sign in with Google -> Complete Google OAuth popup -> See dashboard at / with data synced
Navigate to / -> Fill email input field with invalid format -> Fill password input field -> Click Login button to submit -> See authentication error message

features.name: Dashboard (Home)
features.description: Central dashboard showing classes, quick actions, real-time clock, search/filter, export/import and drag & drop reorder of classes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> See real-time clock in header -> View list of classes -> Click Add Class button -> Navigate to /class/add
Navigate to / -> Drag & Drop a class card to new position -> See class list reordered
Navigate to / -> Use search input and type class name -> See class list filtered by name
Navigate to / when unauthenticated -> See login prompt at /
Navigate to / -> Click Export Data -> Download JSON file -> See export success notification
Navigate to / -> Click Import Data -> Select invalid JSON file -> Click Confirm Import -> See import error message

features.name: Manage Classes
features.description: Create, edit, delete and reorder classes including metadata (room, day, time) and quick links.
user_flows: Navigate to /class/add -> Fill class form fields (name, room, day, time) -> Click Submit -> Redirect to / and see new class in list
Navigate to /class/add -> Leave required field empty -> Click Submit -> See validation error on the required field
Navigate to /class/:id -> Click Edit button -> Navigate to /class/edit/:id -> Update fields -> Click Submit -> Redirect to /class/:id and see updated class details
Navigate to /class/:id -> Click Delete button -> Confirm deletion -> Redirect to / and see class removed from list
Navigate to / -> Drag & Drop class to reorder -> See positions persisted

features.name: Class Detail
features.description: Show full class information (room, day, time), quick links (Zoom/GMeet/Drive with icons), and a list of tasks scoped to the class with deadline indicators.
user_flows: Navigate to /class/:id -> See class information including room, day and time -> See quick links with icons -> See list of class tasks with deadline indicators
Navigate to /class/:id -> Click a task in the class task list -> Navigate to /task/edit/:id
Navigate to /class/:nonexistent -> See 'Class not found' message

features.name: Manage Tasks (My Tasks)
features.description: Add, edit, view, filter and bulk-manage tasks with priority, type, descriptions, attachments (simulated), and status (Pending/Completed).
user_flows: Navigate to /tasks -> Click Add Task -> Navigate to /task/add -> Fill task form (title, due date, priority, type, description) -> Attach file (simulated) -> Click Submit -> Redirect to /tasks and see new task
Navigate to /task/add -> Fill due date in the past -> Click Submit -> See validation error about due date
Navigate to /tasks -> Click a task -> Navigate to /task/edit/:id -> Update fields -> Click Submit -> Redirect to /tasks and see updated task
Navigate to /tasks -> Click filter 'Pending' -> See list filtered to pending tasks only
Navigate to /tasks -> Click 'Delete completed' -> Confirm deletion -> See completed tasks removed from the list

features.name: Backup & Restore (Export / Import JSON)
features.description: Allow users to export all classes and tasks to JSON and import JSON backups to restore or migrate data.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click Export Data -> Download JSON file -> See success notification
Navigate to / -> Click Import Data -> Select valid JSON file -> Click Confirm Import -> See success notification and data updated in UI
Navigate to / -> Click Import Data -> Select malformed JSON file -> Click Confirm Import -> See import error message

features.name: Search & Filter
features.description: Search classes by name and filter schedules by day; filter tasks by status.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Type class name into search field -> See class list filtered to matching names
Navigate to / -> Open day filter and select 'Monday' -> See class list filtered to Monday classes
Navigate to /tasks -> Open status filter and select 'Completed' -> See task list showing only completed tasks
Navigate to / -> Use search with no matching results -> See 'No results' message

features.name: Settings: Theme, Language & Cloud Sync
features.description: Personalization and sync settings: toggle dark mode, switch language (ID/EN), and enable cloud sync via Google account (Firebase).
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click theme toggle -> See UI switch to dark mode and persist preference
Navigate to / -> Open language selector -> Choose Bahasa Indonesia -> See UI text switched to Indonesian
Navigate to / -> Click Sign in with Google -> Complete OAuth -> See account connected and data synced across devices
Navigate to / -> Click Sign in with Google -> OAuth popup blocked -> See auth error notification

features.name: Manage Classes
user_interactions: Click add class, fill form, submit

features.name: Manage Tasks
user_interactions: Click add task, fill form, submit
